title: Claude実装応答ガードの最小正規取り込み
goal: Claude implementation result の必須キー存在を main() 内で検証し、壊れた返却を patch 適用前に停止できるようにする
scope: Claude implementation result required key presence check
warning-only type diagnostics for non-blocking fields
constraints: guard logic must be contained in orchestration/run_session.py
validate_impl_result must be called only inside main()
existing test files must not be modified
validation must run before patch application
required key presence check is blocking
strict type mismatches must be warning-only where needed to preserve existing tests
allowed_changes_detail: orchestration/run_session.py: add validate_impl_result and call it only inside main() before patch application
backend/tests/test_claude_response_guard.py: add regression tests for minimal guard behavior only
implementation_notes: 既存テストファイルは一切変更しない。
以下のファイルは forbidden_changes であり、1行たりとも変更禁止：
■ 既存テストが落ちる場合の対処
validate_impl_result は main() 内でのみ呼ぶ
既存スタブを壊さないため、検証は必須キー存在確認に限定する
型の厳密チェックは warning にとどめる

completion_criteria.condition: missing required keys in Claude implementation result are rejected before patch apply
validate_impl_result is called only inside main()
existing monkeypatched implementation stubs are not broken by strict blocking type checks
type inconsistencies outside required key presence are surfaced as warnings and do not block existing tests
changed_files are limited to allowed_changes only
